title: Yijing Hexagram 3: Zhun (Difficulty at the Beginning)
description: Hexagram 3 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 3 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Difficulty at the Beginning works sublime success, furthering through perseverance. Nothing should be undertaken. It furthers one to install helpers.
